title: STFU
description: Mitigate the constant join/leave messages from players moving between servers
body:
This plugin is meant to alleviate the problem of join/leave messages flooding the chat whenever players move between servers _in the specific situation_ where you also want global notifications when a player joins/leaves the network itself.

The plugin actually has two parts, _STFU_ and _STHU_. ST**F**U is the Velocity side of things. It broadcasts join/leave messages to all servers whenever a player joins or leaves the proxy as a whole. ST**H**U is the Paper plugin--the only thing it does is suppress the vanilla join/leave messages.

### Setup 
1. Install STFU on your Velocity server.
2. Install STHU on each connected Paper server.
